get.description: Liveness probe. Returns 200 when the API process is running.

schema.title: Response Health Check Api V1 Health Get

get.description: Readiness probe. Returns 200 when the database is reachable, 503 otherwise.

Return the authenticated user's profile.

Creates a local DB record on first call for a new Firebase UID.

patch.description:
Update allowed profile fields (language, timezone, date_format, display_name).

Fields not included in the request body are left unchanged.
Protected fields (firebase_uid, email, id, created_at) cannot be changed here.

get.description:
Return current analysis plan limits and feature flags.

This is read-only. Plan changes are intentionally not exposed as public
self-upgrade until billing/admin authorization is implemented.

patch.summary: Development-only current user analysis plan switch
patch.description: Set current user's analysis plan for local development testing only.

post.summary: Preview a single user-provided vacancy URL
post.description:
Fetch and parse one user-provided vacancy URL for an editable preview.

The endpoint does not create or persist applications and does not store imported HTML.

get.summary: List discovery source runtime configuration status

post.summary: Preview a manual source input without saving it
Run safe discovery evaluation without fetching sources
Preview one vacancy URL for a loop without saving it
Save vacancy preview as a match under a loop

get.summary: List vacancy matches for a loop

post.summary: Save one selected discovery preview item as a vacancy match

get.summary: Get one vacancy match for a loop

post.summary: Mark one vacancy match as seen by the current user
post.description:
Stamp ``seen_at`` the first time the user opens this match.

Idempotent: repeated calls keep the original view timestamp. Drives the
per-match "Просмотрено" badge and the "Новые" (unseen) tab.

post.summary: Evaluate deterministic score and duplicate metadata for a vacancy match
Create an application from a saved vacancy match
Create an application from a saved vacancy match

get.summary: Paginated cross-loop feed of saved vacancy matches
get.description:
List persisted matches across all of the user's visible loops.

- ``tab``: ``all`` | ``new`` (unseen and not saved/applied) | ``saved``.
- ``source``: restrict to one source id (case-insensitive).
- ``q``: substring match over company / role / location.
- ``sort``: ``posted`` (freshest, default) | ``company`` | ``loop`` |
  ``score`` (persisted match score, best first, unscored rows last).
Counts for every tab are returned alongside the current page.

post.summary: Save a discovery preview item directly as an Application with status Saved

get.summary: List saved vacancy analyses for a match
Get latest saved vacancy analysis for a match

delete.description:
Soft-delete: sets archived=True. The record remains queryable via
GET /applications?archived=true.

post.description:
Change the application's status, recomputing all derived fields.

Protected fields (stage, last_status_change_at, needs_follow_up …)
are computed server-side and cannot be sent in the request body.

post.summary: Add a comment to an application

get.summary: Activity feed for the current user
KPI summary for the current user's applications

ApplicationPatch.title: ApplicationPatch
ApplicationPatch.description:
All mutable fields. Derived fields (stage, needs_follow_up, …) are
excluded — they are recomputed by the service on every update.

DiscoveryRunPreviewInsight.title: DiscoveryRunPreviewInsight
DiscoveryRunPreviewInsight.description:
Lightweight, read-time heuristic 'fit' breakdown for a preview item.

Computed on the fly against the loop's current role/keywords/location (never
cached) so the user gets an at-a-glance relevance read *before* saving a
vacancy — without any external/LLM call.

MatchesFeedCounts.title: MatchesFeedCounts
MatchesFeedCounts.description:
Tab badge counts, computed under the same q/source/loop scope.

Each count applies its own status rule regardless of the active tab, so the
badges stay stable while the user switches tabs.

MatchesFeedItem.title: MatchesFeedItem
MatchesFeedItem.description: A feed row: a vacancy match plus its owning loop's display name.

ScoreReasonEntry.title: ScoreReasonEntry
ScoreReasonEntry.description:
Machine-readable scoring explanation entry. Clients localize by ``code``
(terms carry the matched tokens/keywords) instead of parsing the legacy
English strings.

StatusTransitionRequest.title: StatusTransitionRequest
StatusTransitionRequest.description:
Body for POST /applications/{id}/status.

`comment` is stored in the STATUS_CHANGE history entry.
`correlation_id` is stored in the STATUS_CHANGE history entry.

UserPatch.title: UserPatch
UserPatch.description:
Fields the user is allowed to update themselves.

- display_name: locally overrideable; None = skip (do not clear)
- language / timezone / date_format: preference fields; None = skip
- firebase_uid / email / id / created_at: immutable, not exposed here

UserRead.title: UserRead
UserRead.description: Public representation of a local user (returned by GET/PATCH /users/me).
